sink.def_en: to go down under water; a kitchen basin

skill.def_en: an ability to do something well

skin.def_en: the outer covering of the body

sleepy.def_en: feeling that you want to sleep

slice.def_en: a thin flat piece cut from food

slippers.def_en: soft shoes worn inside the house

snail.def_en: a small soft animal with a shell

sneakers.def_en: soft shoes for sports or walking

sneaky.def_en: doing things in a secret, unfair way

soap.def_en: something you use to wash and clean

social science.def_en: the study of people and society

society.def_en: all the people living together in a group

soft drink.def_en: a cold sweet drink without alcohol

softball.def_en: a ball game like baseball with a bigger ball

solve.def_en: to find the answer to a problem

soul.def_en: the inner part of a person that is not the body

sour.def_en: having a sharp taste like a lemon

soy-sauce.def_en: a dark salty sauce made from beans

speaker.def_en: a person who talks to an audience; a device that plays sound

speech.def_en: a talk given to a group of people

spirit.def_en: a person's feelings, energy, and mood

spot.def_en: a particular place; a small round mark

spread.def_en: to open out or move to cover more area

state.def_en: a part of a country; a condition of something

stationery store.def_en: a shop that sells pens and paper

steal.def_en: to take something that is not yours

steam.def_en: the hot gas that rises from boiling water

step.def_en: one movement of the foot; one action in a process

stingy.def_en: not willing to spend or share money

stop watch.def_en: a watch used to measure exact time

storm.def_en: very bad weather with strong wind and rain

stove.def_en: a machine used for cooking food

strike.def_en: to hit hard; to stop work in protest

style.def_en: a particular way something looks or is done

subway.def_en: a train that runs under the ground

succeed.def_en: to do well and reach your goal

success.def_en: the act of reaching a goal well

suggest.def_en: to give an idea for someone to think about

suit.def_en: a matching jacket and trousers; to look right on someone

support.def_en: to help someone by agreeing with them

survive.def_en: to stay alive through a hard time

swallow.def_en: to make food or drink go down your throat

swan.def_en: a large white water bird with a long neck

sweep.def_en: to clean the floor with a brush

symbol.def_en: a sign that stands for an idea

system.def_en: a set of parts working together

table tennis.def_en: a game hitting a small ball across a table

talent.def_en: a natural ability to do something well

tank.def_en: a container for water or gas; a war vehicle

teapot.def_en: a container for making and pouring tea

tear.def_en: a drop of water from the eye; to pull apart

temperature.def_en: how hot or cold something is

tent.def_en: a shelter made of cloth for camping

term.def_en: a part of the school year; a special word

textbook.def_en: a book used for studying a subject

Thanksgiving.def_en: an American holiday for giving thanks

through.def_en: from one side or end to the other

thumb.def_en: the short thick finger on your hand

thunder.def_en: the loud sound heard during a storm

title.def_en: the name of a book, film, or song

tofu.def_en: a soft food made from soybeans

toilet.def_en: a bowl for going to the bathroom; a bathroom

tongue.def_en: the soft part in the mouth used to taste and speak
collo: on the tip of my tongue

toothbrush.def_en: a small brush for cleaning teeth

topic.def_en: the subject that people talk or write about

tower.def_en: a tall narrow building or structure

trace.def_en: to find or follow signs left behind

trade.def_en: the buying and selling of goods

tradition.def_en: a custom passed down over many years

trap.def_en: a device for catching animals; to catch

trash can.def_en: a container for putting rubbish in

travel.def_en: to go from one place to another

triangle.def_en: a flat shape with three sides

trousers.def_en: clothing worn on the legs; pants

trumpet.def_en: a brass musical instrument you blow

trust.def_en: to believe someone is honest and good

collo: to be honest with the truth

tube.def_en: a long hollow pipe for liquid or gas

tunnel.def_en: a passage dug under the ground

underline.def_en: to draw a line under a word

underpass.def_en: a path that goes under a road

underwear.def_en: clothes worn next to the skin under others

universe.def_en: all of space and everything in it

university.def_en: a school for study after high school

upstairs.def_en: to or on a higher floor

Valentine's Day.def_en: a day for showing love, February 14

valley.def_en: low land between hills or mountains

vendor.def_en: a person who sells things, often on the street

victory.def_en: a win in a game, fight, or war

village.def_en: a small town in the countryside

vinegar.def_en: a sour liquid used in cooking

visitor.def_en: a person who comes to see a place or person

vocabulary.def_en: all the words a person knows or uses

volleyball.def_en: a game hitting a ball over a net

vote.def_en: to choose someone or something in an election

waist.def_en: the narrow part in the middle of the body

walkman.def_en: a small machine for listening to music

war.def_en: a big fight between countries or groups

waste.def_en: to use something in a careless way

waterfalls.def_en: places where a river drops down steeply

wedding.def_en: a ceremony when two people get married

weekday.def_en: any day from Monday to Friday

wheel.def_en: a round part that turns to move things

while.def_en: during the time that; a short time

wide.def_en: measuring a lot from side to side

wing.def_en: the part a bird uses to fly

wok.def_en: a deep round pan for frying food

wolf.def_en: a wild animal like a large dog

wood.def_en: the hard material that trees are made of

woods.def_en: an area with many trees; a small forest

worm.def_en: a small long thin animal with no legs

wound.def_en: an injury where the skin is cut

wrist.def_en: the joint between the hand and arm

youth.def_en: the time when a person is young
